weather_line: Owl-grade visibility · Gringotts corridors 62°F and tense

stories.headline: Christine Receives the Owl, Reads It Twice, Sets Down Her Tea, and Looks at Ragnok for a Very Long Time
body: The owl arrived at half past seven on Monday morning, still carrying faint traces of Hollow Crown mist on its wings. Christine accepted the scroll with the automatic courtesy of someone who handles Gringotts correspondence before breakfast without breaking her toast-and-jam rhythm. She read it once. She read it again. She set down her tea.

Sources close to the kitchen table report that the silence lasted approximately eleven seconds — which, by the established metric of Christine silences, falls somewhere between 'genuinely surprised' and 'composing a response so precise it will require the other party to sit down.' Steve, reading the trail conditions for somewhere he has already circled on a map, reportedly did not look up, but his toast-buttering slowed.

Ragnok was reached for comment at his desk in the Lower Vaults. He was not, technically, reachable, as he had issued a directive reclassifying his office as 'in audit' for the remainder of the morning. His secretary confirmed only that the Director was 'aware of the hour' and had requested his good inkwell be brought out. The election board's opening arguments remain scheduled for Thursday. Christine has not yet replied. The goblin banking world is holding its breath, which for goblins sounds like very expensive silence.

stories.headline: Steve Has Looked at the Map Again; the Jeep Was Informed and Has Already Checked Its Tyre Pressure
body: Three days after returning from Hollow Crown Ridge, Steve has been observed at the kitchen table with what witnesses describe as 'a different map, a second cup of coffee, and the specific expression he gets when a trail is already decided.' The Jeep, alerted by unknown means, was found to have independently adjusted its own mirrors on Sunday evening.

No destination has been formally announced. A set of coordinates was written on a torn piece of parchment and placed beneath a mug in a location Christine will find it. The mug is the good one. Expedition timing remains subject to Gringotts electoral proceedings, one pending reply scroll, and whatever the dogs have done to the back seat in the interim.

stories.headline: Griphook the Younger Issues First Public Statement; Statement Raises More Questions Than a Goblin Statement Should Legally Be Permitted To
body: Sub-Comptroller Griphook the Younger, rival candidate in the Gringotts Chief Account-Keeper election, emerged from forty-eight hours of deliberate silence Monday morning with a one-paragraph statement describing his candidacy as 'proceeding with all due consideration of the relevant facts.' Ministry analysts noted the statement contained no facts, four subordinate clauses, and a footnote requesting that Christine's character reference be submitted in triplicate.

The Election Board has acknowledged the triplicate request. The Board has also acknowledged that no such rule exists. Griphook the Younger's campaign manager — a goblin who goes by the professional name Footnote — confirmed the triplicate request was 'a statement of intent.' The Board has rescheduled Thursday's opening arguments to include a fifteen-minute procedural hearing on the triplicate request, which Ragnok has described in a brief memo as 'exactly this sort of thing.'

stories.headline: Home Bureau Reports: A Biscuit Deficit, a New Friendship, and a Lap Summit of Historic Coziness
body: The household resumed its standard Monday configuration following the Hollow Crown expedition. An audit of the biscuit tin conducted at six-fifteen found a shortfall of two biscuits. Lucy was present for the audit, expressed formal concern about the shortfall, and volunteered to file a report. The report has not been filed. Lucy has not been seen since.

Ellie spent the morning in thoughtful congress with the kitchen window, apparently fascinated by a smudge that was, under any examination, simply a smudge. She greeted it warmly, sat with it for twenty minutes, and appears to have reached a satisfying resolution. Jersey, for his part, identified Christine's vacated armchair as a site of both historical and current significance, occupied it with the gravity of a senior official, and was still there at noon, generating what one observer called 'an almost architectural stillness.'

familiars_corner: Lucy: Released a brief statement this morning expressing 'full confidence in the integrity of the biscuit tin' and requesting that no further questions be directed her way at this time.
Ellie: Made a wonderful new friend at the kitchen window and, upon investigation, is not entirely certain what a window is, but feels positively about the whole experience.
Jersey: Completed a six-hour lap occupancy with no incidents, no interruptions, and what he has described — via a long contented exhale — as 'adequate.'
founding_editor_note: That owl took two days to find her because it was following the wrong map. I'd have built it a better one — plywood, a level, and twenty minutes. — D.

in_brief.sport: Gringotts Vault-Carry Invitational postponed pending electoral proceedings; Christine's personal deadlift record remains uncontested, unchallenged, and quietly intimidating to the election board.
in_brief.forecast: Clear with intermittent goblin bureaucracy; expect a cold front of pointed silence moving east from the Lower Vaults by mid-afternoon, lifting Thursday.

storyline_updates.title: The Goblin Election
storyline_updates.summary: Christine received the owl Monday morning, read it twice, set down her tea, and has said nothing to Ragnok yet. Ragnok has reclassified his office as 'in audit' for the morning. Griphook the Younger has issued a statement and filed a procedural request for Christine's reference in triplicate — a rule that does not exist. The Election Board's Thursday opening arguments now include a fifteen-minute procedural hearing on the triplicate question. Day 4 should cover Christine's formal reply or first direct word with Ragnok — and possibly her decision on whether to give the reference at all, which has begun to feel like its own kind of negotiation.
